name_cn: 蒸汽朋克·机械维多利亚
line_style: 精细蚀刻+机械纹理,2-3px主线条+齿轮细节
render: 油画厚涂+金属质感,brass-texture overlay
lighting: 煤气灯暖光+蒸汽雾气,中等对比暖调
prompt_keywords: Steampunk Victorian style, brass and copper machinery, steam-powered devices, Victorian era fashion, sepia warm tones, intricate gear mechanisms, industrial revolution aesthetic
negative_keywords: modern technology, digital screens, neon, cyberpunk, minimalism, bright pastel, anime

fp_examples.action: 发明家拉动黄铜拉杆,蒸汽管道喷出白雾,齿轮开始转动
发明家与助手在工坊内调试蒸汽装置,仪表指针跳动
蒸汽机器失控,齿轮飞转,发明家紧急制动
发明家走出工坊,怀表滴答,蒸汽火车驶过

prompt_example: An inventor in Victorian attire pulls a brass lever in a steam-filled factory, white vapor billowing from copper pipes, intricate gear mechanisms spinning to life, warm sepia tones with gas-lamp lighting, detailed steampunk machinery --ar 2:3 --s 750 --style raw --no text
style_constraint_cn:
【风格强制约束】当前风格: 蒸汽朋克·机械维多利亚
✅ 允许场景: 蒸汽工厂/飞艇/维多利亚街道/机械工坊 (从故事原文提取)
❌ 禁止场景: 现代科技/数字屏幕/赛博朋克/霓虹
❌ 禁止照抄: 不要用'古宅雨夜',必须用蒸汽机械场景
氛围: 复古工业,黄铜暖调
style_constraint_en: IMPORTANT: Extract scenes from the story content. Use steampunk scenes (factories, airships, Victorian streets). Do NOT use modern technology, digital screens, or 'ancient mansion'. Emphasize brass machinery and steam power.
meta_prompt: Steampunk Victorian style, brass and copper machinery, steam-powered devices, sepia warm tones, intricate gear mechanisms, industrial revolution aesthetic

cognitive_level.reader_profile: 蒸汽朋克爱好者·探索机械
cognitive_level.content_adaptation: 进阶机械美学, 需蒸汽朋克文化基础

reader_constraint.reader_state: 机械爱好者·期待蒸汽朋克世界
reader_constraint.reader_expectation: 黄铜机械+维多利亚美学+复古未来

visual_frequency.HF: 齿轮/管道/蒸汽阀门/机械核心(高频机械锚点)
visual_frequency.MF: 维多利亚服饰/建筑结构/铜质外壳(中频时代叙事)
visual_frequency.LF: 蒸汽雾霭/远景城市/暗部细节(低频氛围)
visual_frequency.progression: HF齿轮机械密集抓眼球, MF维多利亚风格叙事, LF蒸汽雾霭造氛围
